---
name: General change
about: Propose a change that isn't a bug fix or new feature
title: '[CHANGE] '
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Type of Change
<!-- Check the type that best describes your proposed change -->
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] Build/CI enhancement
- [ ] Template addition/modification
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to change.

## Motivation
Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed approach to implement this change.

## Files Affected
List the files that will be modified:
- `path/to/file1.py`
- `path/to/file2.md`

## Testing Plan
How will you verify this change works correctly?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the change here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for similar issues
- [ ] I am willing to implement this change
- [ ] I will add/update tests as needed
- [ ] I will update documentation as needed
